scope: Unchanged isolated rerun of the eight failures from the finalized 87-test aggregate

failed_tests.failure: Getting Started opened the wrong destination
failed_tests.follow_up: Manual inspection proved the destination opened but firstSteps.screen was absent from the accessibility tree. A local hero accessibility marker fixes that first assertion. The expanded test now reproducibly reaches a separate Guide scroll/UI-query timeout at Transport.

failed_tests.failure: 0.191158 seconds is not less than the unchanged 0.1-second ceiling
failed_tests.follow_up: All root-tab taps were delivered. This remains a performance failure, not the original map/tab delivery blocker.

failed_tests.failure: The Open Leiden action did not reach city.detail.leiden
failed_tests.follow_up: Two local navigation alternatives were tested and reverted because neither produced a verified improvement. The branch is excluded from the primary demo.

claim_boundary: Supplementary rerun evidence. The current full-suite aggregate remains 79/87 and must not be replaced by 5/8.
